title: verbascum longicarpum
intro: Verbascum longicarpum, also known as the long-fruited mullein, is a perennial plant species belonging to the mullein family (Scrophulariaceae). This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly for its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic qualities. The health benefits of Verbascum longicarpum include treating respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma, as well as relieving skin conditions like eczema and wounds. The plant can be prepared in various herbal forms, including teas, tinctures, and salves, which are often used to promote healing and soothe irritated skin.
